children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read raw data from source, parse records, store in raw_data, and log ingestion
children.behavior: Based on source type, read from CSV/JSON/API, parse into records, store in raw_data, and append log entry
children.signature: def IngestData(pipeline_request: dict, raw_data: database) -> dict

data_operations.description: Write parsed records to raw_data store
Append log entry for ingestion step

constraints.description: Must handle source read errors gracefully without crashing pipeline
Must parse records according to source format (CSV/JSON/API)

acceptance_criteria.description: All records from source are parsed and stored in raw_data
Ingestion log entry contains step name, timestamp, records count, and errors

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformation rules to raw_data, store in processed_data, skip malformed records
children.behavior: Read raw_data, apply each rule to each record, skip and log malformed records, store valid results in processed_data
children.signature: def TransformData(pipeline_request: dict, raw_data: database) -> dict

data_operations.description: Read raw records from raw_data store
Write transformed records to processed_data store
Append log entry for transformation step

constraints.description: Must skip malformed records without halting transformation
Must apply all transformation rules defined in pipeline_request.transform_config

acceptance_criteria.description: All valid raw records are transformed and stored in processed_data
Malformed records are skipped and logged with error details

children.name: ValidateData
children.purpose: Check processed_data against quality rules, mark invalid records, compute quality_score
children.behavior: Read processed_data, apply quality rules to each record, compute quality_score, mark invalid records, store results back to processed_data
children.signature: def ValidateData(pipeline_request: dict, processed_data: database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read and update processed records with validation status

data_operations.description: Read processed records, update with quality_score and validation status
Append log entry for validation step

constraints.description: Must compute quality_score for each record based on quality rules
Must mark invalid records without removing them from processed_data

acceptance_criteria.description: All processed records have quality_score and validation status
Invalid records are marked and logged with reason

children.name: ExportData
children.purpose: Format validated records as output and log export
children.behavior: Read processed_data, filter only validated records, format as CSV or JSON, return as data list, log export
children.signature: def ExportData(pipeline_request: dict, processed_data: database) -> dict

data_operations.description: Read processed records from processed_data store
Append log entry for export step

constraints.description: Must only export records with valid quality_score
Must format output according to pipeline_request.output_format (CSV or JSON)

acceptance_criteria.description: Only validated records are included in export output
Export log entry contains step name, timestamp, records exported, and errors

governance_notes: Each child accesses only the data stores it requires. IngestData writes to raw_data; TransformData reads raw_data and writes to processed_data; ValidateData reads and writes processed_data; ExportData reads processed_data. All children write to pipeline_log for auditability. Global variables are scoped per child as a subset of parent globals.
